title: Machine learning prediction of obstructive coronary artery disease using opportunistic coronary calcium and epicardial fat assessments from CT calcium scoring scans
content:
arXiv:2605.21762v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Non-contrast computed tomography calcium scoring (CTCS) is a cost-effective imaging modality widely used to detect coronary artery calcifications. This study aimed to develop an advanced machine learning framework that utilizes quantitative analyses o
quote: 又一个ML预测冠心病的论文——请问有几个能在临床落地？答案是近乎零。

title: Machine-Learning-Enhanced Non-Invasive Testing for MASLD Fibrosis: Shallow-Deep Neural Networks Versus FIB-4, Tabular Foundation Models, and Large Language Models
content:
arXiv:2605.20523v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Advanced fibrosis is a major determinant of liver-related morbidity in metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD). FIB-4 is widely used as a first-line non-invasive test, but its fixed formula may underuse diagnostic informatio
quote: 深度学习vs线性公式FIB-4，胜之不武——但paper就靠这种胜利堆出来的。

title: Innovations in Cardless Artificial Intelligence Banking: A Comprehensive Framework for Cyber Secure and Fraud Mitigation using Machine Learning Algorithms
content:
arXiv:2605.22604v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: The advent of cardless artificial intelligence (AI) banking heralds a paradigm shift in the financial landscape, offering users unprecedented security and convenience. This paper outlines a comprehensive framework designed to enhance cybersecurity,
quote: 无卡银行+AI反欺诈，综合框架听起来唬人，实际是几个公开算法的排列组合。

title: CASE-NET: Deep Spatio-Temporal Representation Learning via Causal Attention and Channel Recalibration for Multivariate Time Series Classification
content:
arXiv:2605.22043v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multivariate time series (MTS) classification is foundational to pervasive computing and financial analysis, yet existing multi-scale paradigms are often constrained by suboptimal representation fidelity. We identify two critical bottlenecks: temporal
quote: CASE-NET缩写凑得漂亮，不去写广告可惜了——时序分类卷王争霸赛又添一选手。

title: Towards Real-world Human Behavior Simulation: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Long-horizon, Cross-scenario, Heterogeneous Behavior Traces
content:
arXiv:2604.08362v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has illuminated the potential for a general-purpose user simulator. However, existing benchmarks remain constrained to isolated scenarios, narrow action spaces, or synthetic data, failing to capt
quote: 让LLM模拟人类行为？先让GPT别把「不知道」说成三页废话再谈benchmark。

title: Design for Manufacturing: A Manufacturability Knowledge-Integrated Reinforcement Learning Framework for Free-Form Pipe Routing in Aeroengines
content:
arXiv:2605.20644v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Design for manufacturing plays a critical role in advanced aeroengine development, where complex components necessitate careful consideration of manufacturability. However, current practices in pipe routing remain largely decoupled from down-stream
quote: RL给发动机管路布线——paper发起来容易，上天要面对的却是物理定律。

title: Cross-Species RSA Reveals Conserved Early Visual Alignment but Divergent Higher-Area Rankings Across Human fMRI and Macaque Electrophysiology
content:
arXiv:2605.22401v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Does the relationship between learning rules and brain alignment generalize across species? We extend our prior finding that untrained CNNs match backpropagation at human V1 by testing the same five learning rules against macaque electrophysiology. Th
quote: 人类和猕猴视觉皮层早期对齐但高层分叉——翻译：低级视觉大家差不多，高级思考就别比了。

title: Protein Thoughts: Interpretable Reasoning with Tree of Thoughts and Embedding-Space Flow Matching for Protein-Protein Interaction Discovery
content:
arXiv:2605.21522v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Protein-protein interactions (PPIs) govern nearly all cellular processes, yet computational methods for identifying binding partners typically produce ranked predictions without mechanistic justification. This creates a fundamental barrier to adopti
quote: Protein Thoughts——ToT在蛋白质领域的第N次魔改，换个名字就是新paper。

title: Prototype-Guided Classification Sub-Task Decoupling Framework: Enhancing Generalization and Interpretability for Multivariate Time Series
content:
arXiv:2605.22055v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Time Series Classification (TSC) is a long-standing research problem that has gained increasing attention in recent years with the rapid growth of large-scale temporal data. Despite substantial progress enabled by deep learning, designing TSC models t
quote: 原型引导时序分类脱耦——听起来深奥，翻译过来就是老祖宗的智慧：分而治之。

title: Comparing Explanations is Not Enough, Explain the Change: New Standards are Needed to Explain Behavioral Shifts in Large Language Models
content:
arXiv:2602.02304v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Large-scale foundation models exhibit \emph{behavioral shifts} when subjected to interventions such as scaling, fine-tuning, reinforcement learning with human feedback, or in-context learning. Current explainability methods are structurally ill-su
quote: 别再解释LLM的解释了，解释它为什么变了——审稿人终于受不了「模型是黑盒」这种甩锅了。

title: HealthMamba: An Uncertainty-aware Spatiotemporal Graph State Space Model for Effective and Reliable Healthcare Facility Visit Prediction
content:
arXiv:2602.05286v3 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Healthcare facility visit prediction is essential for optimizing healthcare resource allocation and informing public health policy. Despite advanced machine learning methods being employed for better prediction performance, existing works usually
quote: HealthMamba——把Mamba塞进医疗预测，名字比HealthTransformer好听但本质差不多。

title: SepsisAI Orchestrator: A Containerized and Scalable Platform for Deploying AI Models and Real-Time Monitoring in Early Sepsis Detection
content:
arXiv:2605.22331v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Despite strong predictive results in the clinical machine learning literature, the translation of these models into bedside use remains limited by systems-level barriers: heterogeneous data representations, the absence of standardized deployment workf
quote: SepsisAI容器化部署——Docker能解决的问题都不是真问题，真问题是医院敢不敢用。

title: DeepSeek V4价格打骨折，宁王京东网易抢着入场，梁文锋：目标是AGI
content: DeepSeek V4大幅降价引爆AI价格战，宁德时代、京东、网易等巨头抢滩入场。梁文锋承诺坚持开源路线，融资已飙至700亿，管理层表示目标直指AGI而非短期商业化。
quote: 卷王出手，一个能打的都没有

title: Anthropic Project Glasswing发现1万+高危漏洞
content: Anthropic的Project Glasswing合作伙伴使用Claude Mythos Preview发现超过1万个高危软件漏洞，Cloudflare一家就挖到2000个Bug，漏洞发现效率提升10倍，微软甲骨文Google等参与。
quote: AI挖洞比人猛，谁还敢说模型只会写诗

title: Microsoft开始大规模取消Claude Code授权
content: Microsoft计划6月30日前从数千名开发者手中收回Claude Code授权，强制迁移至GitHub Copilot CLI。工程师普遍更喜欢Claude Code，但微软为削减成本做出这一决定。
quote: 自家孩子再差也是亲生的，Anthropic只是备胎

title: Lance: 字节跳动发布轻量统一多模态模型
content: 字节跳动开源Lance模型，仅3B激活参数同时支持图像和视频理解、生成与编辑。在128块A100上从零训练，定位轻量级多模态统一方案，同日arXiv论文同步发布。
quote: 字节卷王又来卷多模态了

title: MOSS: AI Agent通过源码自进化，无需人工干预
content: MOSS系统让AI Agent在源码层面自我进化——通过生产故障证据批处理、确定性多阶段管线、容器热替换，将四任务评分从0.25提升到0.61，全程无需人工干预。
quote: Agent学会自己修Bug了，程序员别睡了

title: Google DeepMind AI自主解决9个Erdős数学难题
content: Google DeepMind大规模评估LLM形式化证明能力：自主解决353个悬而未决的Erdős问题中的9个，证明44个OEIS猜想，单个问题成本仅数百美元，为AI数学研究树立里程碑。
quote: 数学家们准备好失业了吗

title: 英伟达押注WAM新范式：终结VLA？首篇世界动作模型综述发布
content: Jim Fan在红杉AI Ascent大会宣称VLA路线走到尽头，首篇世界动作模型WAM综述正式发布。英伟达全面押注具身智能新范式，试图终结现有VLA路线。
quote: VLA已死，WAM当立

title: NuExtract3发布：开源4B VLM文档提取模型
content: Numind发布NuExtract3，4B参数开源VLM（Apache-2.0，基于Qwen3.5），支持文档转Markdown和结构化数据提取，仅需4GB显存即可自托管，8xH100训练3天。
quote: 又一个4B模型卷文档，4GB显存就能跑

title: Google AI Overviews漏洞：说disregard就变聊天机器人
content: Google AI Overviews出现严重功能故障：输入disregard等关键词后，搜索结果页面变成聊天机器人回复模式，完全忽略传统搜索功能。Google承认问题并正在修复。
quote: AI搜索：好的，那我假装没看见

title: AI初创Peec半年ARR翻倍至1000万美元
content: 柏林AI初创Peec帮助企业追踪在AI搜索引擎中的可见度，B轮融资2100万美元后仅6个月ARR破1000万美元。证明欧洲AI初创不走烧钱路线也能快速增长，GEO概念渐热。
quote: GEO > SEO，钞能力从不骗人

title: Gated DeltaNet-2: NVIDIA解耦注意力擦除与写入门控
content: NVIDIA提出Gated DeltaNet-2，在线性注意力中解耦擦除门与写入门。1.3B规模训练超越Mamba-2和3及KDA，长上下文RULER测试优势显著，推动状态空间模型新方向。
quote: 终于有人把注意力擦写解耦了

title: OpenAI大神Jason Liu教你如何榨干Codex
content: 13k星开源库Instructor作者Jason Liu刚加入OpenAI就撰文分享Codex-maxxing心法：开跨月存活巨型线程、锁屏远程干活，连亚马逊退款都能自动搞定，引发开发者社区热议。
quote: 新员工把公司底裤扒干净了
